puzzles.summary: Israel announced it killed top Iranian security official Ali Larijani and the head of the Basij militia in overnight strikes, marking a major escalation in the conflict between the two nations.
President Trump declared he could 'take' Cuba as the island nation suffered a nationwide blackout after its energy grid collapsed amid a U.S. oil blockade.

clues: Site of a major U.S. military withdrawal
Located along the river of the same name
puzzles.summary: Hundreds are feared dead after a strike on a hospital in the Afghan capital, with the Taliban blaming Pakistan for the attack that threatens to escalate tensions between the neighboring countries.
The Lakers extended their winning streak to six games with a hard-fought victory over the Houston Rockets on Monday night.

clues: International tournament held every four years
Features national teams from multiple continents
Premier international competition for the sport
puzzles.summary: Team USA faces Venezuela in the World Baseball Classic final, with manager Mark DeRosa facing critical lineup decisions ahead of the championship game.

clues: Daughter of a controversial political figure
puzzles.summary: Le Pen's National Rally performed well in the first round of French local elections but faces its traditional challenge in the second round, where rival parties can unite against it.

clues: Named after a Japanese mythological undersea palace
puzzles.summary: A new study reveals that samples from this asteroid contain all five DNA and RNA building blocks, bolstering the theory that asteroid impacts may have helped spark life on Earth.

Best Picture is the top prize
puzzles.summary: The 98th annual Academy Awards ceremony took place, hosted by Conan O'Brien, with 'Sinners' among the notable films and Barbra Streisand making headlines in what was described as a messy but celebratory night.

clues: Made by a Cupertino tech giant
puzzles.summary: Apple refreshed its premium over-ear headphones with a new H2 chip replacing the H1, bringing 10 notable audio improvements to the second generation of the product.

clues: Caused by inhaling fine mineral dust
Risk in stone cutting and mining
puzzles.summary: A surge in quartz countertop fabrication has triggered a growing epidemic of this incurable lung disease among Bay Area workers who cut and polish the popular kitchen material without adequate protection.
